full_text:
Dongguo Yannian (Gongyou) 東郭延年
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dongguo Yannian (東郭延年), styledGongyou, was born in Shan-yang. Noted for long life and youthful appearance, obtained by various methods. Dongguo Yannian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
